mapper.select: select company_seq as companySeq, company_name as companyName, ceo_name as ceoName, business_number as businessNumber, company_tel as companyTel, company_email as companyEmail, company_address as companyAddress, company_detail_addr as companyDetailAddr, company_fax as companyFax, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, updated_id as updatedId, company_zonecode as companyZonecode from company_info
mapper.update: update company_info set company_name = #{dto.companyName}, ceo_name = #{dto.ceoName}, business_number = #{dto.businessNumber}, company_tel = #{dto.companyTel}, company_email = #{dto.companyEmail}, company_address = #{dto.companyAddress}, company_detail_addr = #{dto.companyDetailAddr}, company_fax = #{dto.companyFax}, updated_at = CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS TIMESTAMP), company_zonecode = #{dto.companyZonecode}, updated_id = #{loginId} where company_seq = #{dto.companySeq}
